summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TA Engine Research and Structure tabs. Most core functionality working correctly with some minor issues in TA Explorer panel visibility.

ui_bugs.issue: TA Explorer panel with 3 tabs (Patterns, Analysis, Trade) not fully visible or accessible via data-testid selectors
ui_bugs.details: Panel exists but tabs are not accessible through expected data-testid attributes

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access individual layer data (L2, L7, L9, L10) through UI testing
integration_issues.details: Layer elements not found with expected data-testid attributes

passed_tests: Pattern API /api/ta-engine/pattern-v2/BTC works and returns patterns
Research tab loads and displays correctly
Research tab overlays work (Pattern, View, Setup, TA)
Double Bottom card shows Score (72%), BULLISH status, ACTIVE status
Structure tab loads without redirecting to Prediction page
Pattern Lifecycle filtering shows FORMING and DEVELOPING stages
Chart displays with candlestick data and overlays
Context bar shows Macro, Neutral, Mid-term, Developing, Short-term, Consolidation
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI improvements needed: 1) Ensure TA Explorer panel tabs (Patterns, Analysis, Trade) are properly accessible with data-testid attributes, 2) Verify layer elements (L2, L7, L9, L10) have correct data-testid selectors for testing, 3) Consider making Fibonacci overlay more accessible (currently requires specific text matching)
